coverage_note: The bundled LCT population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from LCT intestinal lactose hydrolysis, brush-border disaccharidase activity, enhancer regulation, and lactase persistence biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000115850: LCT coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: LCT findings should be read against intestinal lactose hydrolysis, brush-border disaccharidase activity, enhancer regulation, and lactase persistence biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs4988235 (-13910 C>T lactase persistence marker) is curated as a LCT marker for Lactase persistence and lactose intolerance context, Intestinal brush-border carbohydrate digestion; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
